skills.name: aos-core-orientation
skills.description: Use AOS as Playwright CLI for desktop agents through direct ./aos commands. Trigger when an agent is new to AOS, needs the capability map, or must avoid stale wrappers and competing workflow language.
skills.ownership: AOS-owned installable orientation skill for direct AOS command onboarding.

skills.name: aos-runtime-readiness
skills.description: Use direct ./aos runtime gates before live AOS work. Trigger when an agent needs to check readiness, status, permissions, daemon health, or safe passive diagnostics before using canvases, browser targets, input, voice, or runtime state.
skills.ownership: AOS-owned installable runtime readiness skill.

skills.name: aos-desktop
skills.description: Use AOS as Playwright CLI for desktop app, window, and native AX work. Trigger when a task needs desktop discovery, app/window control, native AX press/focus/set-value, or a decision about unsupported desktop verbs.
skills.ownership: AOS-owned installable desktop, app, window, and native AX workflow skill.

skills.name: aos-saved-workspace
skills.description: Use AOS saved perception workspaces with `aos see capture --save`, `aos see snapshots`, `aos see refs`, and compact refs for observe-act-recapture loops. Trigger when a task needs saved snapshots, refs, ref-scoped dry-runs or actions, snapshot diffs, or compact UI/browser/native evidence without carrying full screenshots or AX payloads in context.
skills.ownership: AOS-owned installable saved workspace and ref workflow skill.

skills.name: aos-toolkit-authoring
skills.description: Choose and compose AOS toolkit controls, panels, workbenches, components, DesktopWorld scenes, radial menus, and trusted visual extensions. Trigger when an agent must decide which AOS toolkit layer owns a reusable UI or visual behavior before implementing it.
skills.ownership: AOS-owned installable toolkit boundary-selection and authoring skill.

skills.name: aos-desktop-world-authoring
skills.description: Author, validate, run, inspect, profile, and replay AOS DesktopWorld scenes through data-only cartridges or reviewed trusted extensions. Trigger for multi-display 3D scenes, gestures, radial menus, scene telemetry, extension review, or detachable engine DevTools.
skills.ownership: AOS-owned installable DesktopWorld scene-authoring and engine-inspection skill.

skills.name: aos-radial-menu-authoring
skills.description: Author logical, semantic, 2D, and 3D AOS radial menus and radial items with bounded gestures, dismissal, hover visuals, transitions, effects, actions, inspection, and tests. Trigger for radial menus, 3D menu items, hover animation, radial item art, or radial-menu workbenches.
skills.ownership: AOS-owned installable radial-menu and radial-item authoring skill.

skills.name: aos-canvas-vision
skills.description: Use AOS canvas and vision fallback safely. Trigger when a task needs regions, coordinates, xray, labels, canvas refs, visual evidence, or a decision about coordinate fallback.
skills.ownership: AOS-owned installable canvas, vision, and coordinate fallback skill.

skills.name: aos-focus-sessions
skills.description: Use AOS focus channels as the desktop session model. Trigger when a task needs named window or browser sessions, parallel-agent isolation, channel cleanup, or browser/app target lifecycle decisions.
skills.ownership: AOS-owned installable focus channel and session lifecycle skill.

skills.name: aos-browser
skills.description: Use AOS browser saved refs and action envelopes for durable browser work. Trigger when a task involves browser capture, DOM/SOM refs, browser-backed do actions, browser evidence, or deciding between AOS browser wrappers and upstream Playwright CLI escape hatches.
skills.ownership: AOS-owned installable browser workflow skill with explicit Playwright CLI companion boundary.

skills.name: aos-verification
skills.description: Use AOS recapture, ref diff, gates, and Work Records for desktop proof. Trigger when a task needs an act-recapture-verify loop, refs diff/expect, diagnostics evidence, durable evidence, or a stop decision on stale targets.
skills.ownership: AOS-owned installable verification and evidence-loop skill.

skills.name: aos-operator-annotations
skills.description: Use AOS pending operator annotations safely. Trigger when an agent needs to list, read, consume, delete, or link compact operator annotations, especially annotations that point at saved refs, fallback targets, or Work Record evidence.
skills.ownership: AOS-owned installable operator annotation workflow skill.

skills.name: aos-work-records
skills.description: Use AOS Work Record commands for evidence, verification, recovery guidance, repair planning, and report-only status. Trigger when an agent needs to inspect a Work Record, verify it, plan repair, link evidence, or avoid changing repair/finalization semantics.
skills.ownership: AOS-owned installable Work Record inspection and recovery skill.

skills.name: aos-recipes
skills.description: Use AOS source-backed executable recipes without confusing them with skills or workflows. Trigger when an agent needs to list, explain, dry-run, or run an AOS recipe.
skills.ownership: AOS-owned installable recipe workflow skill.

skills.name: aos-command-surface-maintenance
skills.description: Maintain AOS command surfaces, help, manifests, docs, and tests. Trigger when an agent changes ./aos commands, external wrappers, source command manifests, generated command registries, parser flags, or public command documentation.
skills.ownership: AOS-owned installable command-surface maintenance skill.

skills.name: agent-sync
skills.description: Historical tombstone for the retired Codex native custom-agent sync path. Do not use this skill to register, rename, retire, or sync agents.
skills.ownership: AOS-owned fail-closed tombstone for ADR 0019.

skills.name: aos-agent-workspace
skills.description: Retired broad saved-workspace skill. Use aos-desktop, aos-saved-workspace, aos-canvas-vision, aos-focus-sessions, and aos-verification for installable AOS desktop guidance.
skills.ownership: AOS-owned historical tombstone for the broad saved-workspace skill split.

skills.name: browser-adapter
skills.description: Retired broad browser adapter skill. Use aos-browser for AOS browser refs and upstream Playwright CLI skills for browser-only primitives.
skills.ownership: AOS-owned historical tombstone for the broad browser adapter skill.

skills.name: caveman
skills.description: Ultra-compressed communication mode. Cuts token usage ~75% by speaking like caveman while keeping full technical accuracy. Supports intensity levels: lite, full (default), ultra, wenyan-lite, wenyan-full, wenyan-ultra. Use when user says "caveman mode", "talk like caveman", "use caveman", "less tokens", "be brief", or invokes /caveman. Also auto-triggers when token efficiency is requested.
skills.ownership: Local communication compression skill, outside the AOS installable skill product.

skills.name: aos-maintainer-routing
skills.description: Route AOS maintainer validation through deterministic repo workflow rules. Use inside agent-os when choosing proof or test commands for changed files, proof-worth assets, command surfaces, docs, skills, or implementation paths; call node scripts/aos-dev-workflow.mjs recommend.
skills.ownership: Repo maintainer validation-routing helper, outside the AOS installable skill product.

skills.name: aos-repo-binary-build
skills.description: Run the raw repo-local AOS binary build workflow safely. Use inside agent-os when ./aos is missing, exits 137, Swift or native runtime inputs changed, build verification is requested, or TCC/Cylance-sensitive repo binary rebuild handling matters; call node scripts/aos-dev-build.mjs build or bash build.sh --force --no-restart when ./aos is dead.
skills.ownership: Repo maintainer binary-build helper, outside the AOS installable skill product.

skills.name: aos-maintainer-orientation
skills.description: Collect AOS maintainer session orientation from live repo, GitHub, and runtime facts. Use inside agent-os at the start of maintainer work, successor handoffs, PR or review resumption, dirty-state checks, or when current branch, GitHub, and AOS readiness need a sourced summary; call node scripts/aos-dev-situation.mjs --json.
skills.ownership: Repo maintainer orientation helper, outside the AOS installable skill product.

skills.name: issue-hygiene-sweep
skills.description: Audit open GitHub issues against the AGENTS.md "open is not automatically current" rule. Classify each issue as landed, superseded, active, or unclear, and propose next steps. Read-only: never closes, comments, labels, or edits issues. User decides what to act on.
skills.ownership: Repo/GitHub hygiene audit helper, outside the AOS installable skill product.

skills.name: plan-retirement-audit
skills.description: Audit docs/superpowers/plans/*.md against the AGENTS.md retirement-or-supersession policy. Classify each plan as landed, superseded, active, or unclear, and propose next steps. Read-only: never moves, archives, edits, or deletes files. User decides what to act on.
skills.ownership: Repo docs audit helper, outside the AOS installable skill product.

skills.name: symphony-talent-design
skills.description: Use this skill to generate well-branded interfaces and assets for Symphony Talent, either for production or throwaway prototypes/mocks/slides/etc. Contains essential design guidelines, colors, type, fonts, assets, and UI kit components for prototyping on the Symphony Talent "Full-Funnel" recruitment marketing platform brand.
skills.ownership: Private brand/design skill, not part of the AOS installable skill pack.
